mapper.sql: ADVERTISE_NAME, ADVERTISE_POSITION, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, ADVERTISE_LINK, ADVERTISE_PIC, IS_ENABLE, LINK_MAN, EMAIL, TELEPHONE, ADVERTISE_DETAILSPIC, ADVERTISE_MEMO, SECKILL_ID, COUPON_ID, ADVERTISE_ID
mapper.update:
update
set ADVERTISE_NAME = #{ADVERTISE_NAME}, ADVERTISE_POSITION = #{ADVERTISE_POSITION}, STARTDATE = #{STARTDATE}, ENDDATE = #{ENDDATE}, ADVERTISE_LINK = #{ADVERTISE_LINK}, ADVERTISE_PIC = #{ADVERTISE_PIC}, IS_ENABLE = #{IS_ENABLE}, LINK_MAN = #{LINK_MAN}, EMAIL = #{EMAIL}, TELEPHONE = #{TELEPHONE}, ADVERTISE_MEMO = #{ADVERTISE_MEMO}, SECKILL_ID = #{SECKILL_ID}, COUPON_ID = #{COUPON_ID}, ADVERTISE_ID = ADVERTISE_ID where ADVERTISE_ID = #{ADVERTISE_ID}
